member.summary: The configuration type for an automapper config

member.summary: The defualt configuration type for the model

member.name: F:Clawfoot.Core.Enums.AutomapperConfigType.NoExpandedRelations
member.summary: A config type that will not expand entity relations when mapping

member.summary: Collection expression type used in ExpressionBuilders

member.name: F:Clawfoot.Core.Enums.CollectionExpressionType.Contains
member.summary: A Contains() expression

member.summary: Service types provided by Clawfoot projects Intended for use when registering with a DI container

member.name: T:Clawfoot.Core.Enums.RelativeHandedSide
member.summary: The relative Left or Right hand side

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Interfaces.ICrudService.EntityExists(System.Object,System.Type)
member.summary: Determines if the entity with the given type and key exists in the context
member.param: The type of the entity or DTO that impliments

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Interfaces.ICrudService.ReadMany``1(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Reads all entites of that exist in the database Use with discression
member.param: Will only expand relations if this is a DTO

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Interfaces.ICrudService.ReadSingle``1(System.Object,System.Boolean)
member.summary: This reads a single entity or DTO
member.typeparam: This should either be an entity class or a DTO which has a interface
member.param: Whether the relations for this entity should be loaded
member.returns: The single entity or DTO that was found by the keys. If its an entity class then it is tracked

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Interfaces.ICrudService.ReadSingle``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{``0,System.Boolean}},System.Boolean)
member.summary: This reads a single entity or DTO using a where clause
member.typeparam: This should either be an entity class or a DTO which has a interface
member.param: The where expression should return a single instance
Whether the relations for this entity should be loaded
member.returns: The single entity or DTO that was found by the where clause. If its an entity class then it is tracked

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Interfaces.ICrudService.CreateAndSave``1(``0)
member.summary: This will create a new entity in the database. If you provide class which is an entity class (i.e. in your EF Core database) then the method will add, and then call SaveChanges. If the class you provide is a DTO which has a interface it will use that to create the entity with AutoMapper
member.typeparam: This type is found from the input instance
member.param: This should either be an instance of a entity class or a DTO which has a interface

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Interfaces.ICrudService.UpdateAndSave``1(``0)
member.summary: This will update the entity referred to by the keys in the given class instance. For a entity class instance it will check the state of the instance. If its detached it will call Update, otherwise it assumes its tracked and calls SaveChanges For a DTO it will: a) load the existing entity class using the primary key(s) in the DTO b) Try to copy the data over with AutoMapper c) Call SaveChanges
member.typeparam: This type is found from the input instance
member.param: This should either be an instance of a entity class or a DTO which has a interface

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Interfaces.ICrudService.CreateOrUpdateAndSave``1(``0,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: This will update the entity referred to by the keys in the given class instance. If the entity doe snot exist it will create it. For a entity class instance it will check the state of the instance. If its detached it will call Update, otherwise it assumes its tracked and calls SaveChanges For a DTO it will: a) load the existing entity class using the primary key(s) in the DTO b) Try to copy the data over with AutoMapper c) Call SaveChanges
member.typeparam: This type is found from the input instance
member.param: This should either be an instance of a entity class or a DTO which has a interface
If the Entity was updated or not

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Interfaces.ICrudService.DeleteAndSave``1(System.Object)
member.summary: This will delete the entity class with the given primary key
member.typeparam: The entity or model class you want to delete.

member.name: T:Clawfoot.Core.Interfaces.IEntity
member.summary: An entity

member.name: T:Clawfoot.Core.Interfaces.ILinkToEntity`1
member.summary: Compile-time marker interface, no need for methods This lets the services know which entity class to map the DTO to

member.name: T:Clawfoot.Core.Interfaces.IModel
member.summary: Marker Interface To create a type constraint for methods/classes with IEntity and ILinkToEntity

member.name: T:Clawfoot.Core.KeyPair`2
member.summary: Represents a pair of keys that are related to each other and are not necessarily a key/value pair. Used within the IndexedKeyMap

member.name: P:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.Errors
member.summary: The list of errors of this status

member.name: P:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.Exceptions
member.summary: The list of exceptions contained in this status

member.name: P:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.Success
member.summary: If there are no errors this is true

member.name: P:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.HasErrors
member.summary: If there are errors this is true

member.name: P:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.HasExceptions
member.summary: If the status contains exceptions

member.name: P:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.Message
member.summary: The message of this status, does not combine error messages. Use ToString() instead

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.AsGeneric``1
member.summary: Converts this into an
member.typeparam: The Generic Type for the returned status

members.member:
Creates a , merges this status into it, and sets the result
///

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.MergeStatuses(Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus)
member.summary: Will combine the errors and exceptions of the provided status with this status. If the provided status has a different success message, and no errors, replaces this statuses success message with the provided status. Returns this status
member.param: The status to merge into this status

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.MergeIntoStatus(Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus)
member.summary: Will combine the errors and exceptions of this status into the provided status. Returns the provided status

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.ToString(System.String)
member.summary: Combines all error messages into a single string

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.ToUserFriendlyString(System.String)
member.summary: Combines all user-friendly error messages into a single string

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.AddException(System.Exception)
member.summary: Adds the provided exception to the status. This also adds the exception message as new error

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.AddError(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a new error to the status

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.AddErrorIfNull``1(``0,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a new error to the status if the item is null

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.AddErrorIfNull``1(System.Nullable{``0},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a new error to the status if the item is null
member.remarks: This only accepts structs that implement

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.AddErrorIfNullOrDefault``1(``0,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a new error to the status if the item is null or is default(T)

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.AddErrorIfNullOrDefault``1(System.Nullable{``0},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a new error to the status if the item is null or is default(T)
member.remarks: This only accepts structs that implement

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.Invoke(System.Action,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Invokes the delegate, and if it throws an exception, records it in the current status. Returns this status

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.Invoke``1(System.Action{``0},``0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Invokes the delegate, and if it throws an exception, records it in the current status. Returns this status

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.InvokeAndMergeStatus(System.Func{Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Invokes the delegate that returns an , and merges that result status into this status If an exception occurs, records that exception in this status. Returns this status

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.InvokeMergeStatusAndReturnResult``1(System.Func{Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus{``0}},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Invokes the delegate that returns an , merges that result status into this status, and returns the TResult result If an exception occurs, records that exception in this status and returns default(TResult). Returns this status

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus.InvokeAndReturnResult``1(System.Func{``0},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Invokes the delegate, and if it throws an exception, records it in the current status and returns default(TResult). If success, return the result of the delegate
member.param: To keep the exception in the status, or just record the error message

member.name: P:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus`1.Result
member.summary: The return result, or if there are errors it will return default(T)

member.name: P:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus`1.HasResult
member.summary: If this status has a result. Returns false if there are errors, even if a result has been set

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus`1.SetResult(`0)
member.summary: Sets the result of the status

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus`1.AddError(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a new error to the status

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus`1.AddErrorIfNull``1(``0,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a new error to the status if the item is null

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus`1.AddErrorIfNull``1(System.Nullable{``0},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a new error to the status if the item is null
member.remarks: This only accepts structs that implement

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus`1.AddErrorIfNullOrDefault``1(``0,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a new error to the status if the item is null or is default(T)

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus`1.AddErrorIfNullOrDefault``1(System.Nullable{``0},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a new error to the status if the item is null or is default(T)
member.remarks: This only accepts structs that implement

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus`1.MergeStatuses(Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus{`0})
member.summary: Will combine the result, errors, and exceptions of the provided status with this status. If the provided status has a different success message, and no errors, replaces this statuses success message with the provided status. Will prioritize keeping the status result that exists. If this status doesn't have a result, and the provided status doe, will keep the provided result. If both statuses have a result, this will prioritize the current statuses result over the provided status. Returns this status
member.param: The status to merge into this status

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus`1.MergeIntoStatus(Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus{`0})
member.summary: Will combine the errors, exceptions, and result of this status into the provided status using . Returns the provided status

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus`1.MergeIntoStatusAndReturnResult(Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus)
member.summary: Will combine the errors and exceptions of this status into the provided status using . Returns the result of this status

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus`1.MergeIntoStatusAndReturnResult(Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus{`0})
member.summary: Will combine the errors, exceptions, and result of this status into the provided status using . Returns the result of this status

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus`1.ConvertTo``1(``0)
member.summary: Converts this generic status to one with the provided result type Used by the MapTo exxtension method

member.name: M:Clawfoot.Core.Status.IGenericStatus`1.InvokeAndSetResult(System.Func{`0},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Invokes the delegate, and if it throws an exception, records it in the current status and returns null. If success, sets the status result, and returns the result of the delegate
